title: Jucunda tomentosa
taxonomy: Jucunda tomentosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. More specifically, Jucunda tomentosa is part of the genus Jucunda. Within the family Rubiaceae, Jucunda tomentosa is placed in the tribe Rubieae. This tribe is one of the largest and most diverse groups within the Rubiaceae family. The classification of Jucunda tomentosa reflects its evolutionary relationships with other species within the family.
